entities.title: Configure Entities
entities.description:
Enter LOGO! block addresses separated by commas.
Example: {example}

addresses.title: VM Addresses
addresses.description: Confirm or override the VM address for each entity. Format: byte.bit for digital (e.g. 0.0), byte for analog (e.g. 1032). Enable 'Push button' to make an NI a momentary pulse instead of a toggle switch.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to LOGO! at the specified address
error.invalid_entity: Invalid entity address. Use format like NI1, AI3, Q1
error.invalid_address: Invalid address format. Use byte.bit for digital (e.g. 0.0) or byte for analog.

addresses.title: VM Addresses
addresses.description: Confirm or override the VM address for each entity. Format: byte.bit for digital (e.g. 0.0), byte for analog (e.g. 1032).
